### 1. Zoho Tables

Zoho Tables gives you a smarter way to organize work and data, bringing together the power of a database, the ease of a spreadsheet, and the intelligence of AI in one streamlined platform.

#### Strengths

Offers a familiar spreadsheet interface with the ability to establish relationships between tables with just a few clicks

Comes with a rich library of views: Grid, Gallery, Kanban, Calendar, and Forms

Allows easy automation of routine tasks, as well as workflow automation across different apps through its integration with Zapier and Zoho Flow

Includes a powerful, fully featured mobile app that lets you build no-code databases on both iOS and Android.

Professional $2.50 [...] ## Get started today with Zoho Tables

Every tool excels in its own category, and there’s no single “right” choice for everyone. But if you’re a team that works heavily with spreadsheets and now needs something more structured, more collaborative, and easier to automate, then this is exactly where Zoho Tables fits.

Zoho Tables is built for SMB teams that want a spreadsheet-familiar relational database without the complexity of coding, queries, or heavyweight enterprise software. It gives you the operational rigor of a database with the simplicity of a spreadsheet, making it ideal for teams that want to:

 Plan and track work
 Collaborate effortlessly with your team
 Streamline and automate everyday workflows
 Store, organize, and manage your data with structure and clarity

 Smartsheet vs. Zoho Tables: Which works better for your business?

# Smartsheet vs. Zoho Tables: Which works better for your business?

 Last Updated : September 12, 2025
 678 Views
 3 Min Read

Smartsheet vs Zoho Tables

Smartsheet was launched in 2006 as a flexible spreadsheet alternative to manage work. It attracted small and medium businesses that wanted a simple tool to manage data and work processes. Over the years, it's shifted its focus to enterprises that want to manage projects, collaborate with teams, and track work.

In this blog post, we'll compare Zoho Tables and Smartsheet to help you choose which is better for your business.

## Feature comparison between Smartsheet and Zoho Tables

### Diverse data types [...] Alternatively, they can also import data from local storage, cloud storage, URLs, and Zoho CRM. This makes it easier to migrate data and start working with a minimal setup.

### Pricing

Smartsheet offers three pricing tiers: pro, business, and enterprise. Pro starts at $9 per user per month and has limited features. Business starts at $19 per user per month. Only the enterprise plan has features such as AI formulas, charts, and data analysis, and its price varies by business.

Zoho Tables has two plans: free and professional. The professional plan is priced at $4 per user per month, making it accessible for businesses of all sizes.

### Use case

results.title: A better spreadsheet-database hybrid alternative to SeaTable
results.content:
You're using traditional spreadsheets to manage work data and need something more structured and collaborative.
 You're using SeaTable, but it isn't meeting your team’s expectations.

## Features of Zoho Tables

Zoho Tables has everything to cater to your data management needs, with dynamic features that eliminate common roadblocks and help your team do more with data.

#### Data visualisation

In SeaTable, you need to use plugins to add some of the views, such as map and timeline. In contrast, Zoho Tables allows you to switch between different views instantly, without additional setup. You can choose the view that best fits your work—Grid view for data entry, Gallery view for visual summaries, Kanban view to track progress or calendar to stay on top of deadlines. [...] #### Intuitive interface

Zoho Tables is designed with simplicity in mind. Anyone can start using it right away, without any training, and experience improved productivity. The clean layout and familiar spreadsheet-style design makes it easy for anyone to get started and stay organized.

#### Real-time collaboration

Zoho Tables enables real-time collaboration, with features like live cursors and record-level comments. Team members can start discussions on specific records without leaving the app, keeping communication and context in one place.

You also have the flexibility to assign one of five predefined access levels to each collaborator: [...] #### Mobile

Zoho Tables offers dedicated mobile apps for both Android and iOS. The mobile version includes nearly all the features available on the web app, along with mobile-specific capabilities like scanning tabular data, uploading voice attachments, creating bases using Siri, and viewing video attachments in picture-in-picture mode. These features make it easy to capture and manage data seamlessly, even while on the move.

## Pricing

Zoho Tables follows a freemium model that includes a free plan and a Professional plan. The Professional plan starts at per user per month (billed annually). You can also explore all premium features without any limitations using the 15-day free trial.

/user/month billed annually
